headline: How Aflac (AFL) Investors Can Read A Steady Target And Evolving Company Story
summary: Aflac’s latest analyst update keeps the price target unchanged, with no revisions to the previous level. Even without a new price target or fresh commentary, the stability itself gives you a reference point for how the stock is currently being framed in analyst models. Read on to see how to interpret this kind of steady outlook and how to keep tracking the evolving narrative around Aflac. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Aflac shifts by adding it to your watchlist or portfolio...

headline: Globe Life Hits 52-Week High: Time to Add the Stock for Solid Returns?
summary: GL is benefiting from premium growth, rising investment income and strong sales momentum across its insurance businesses.
